title: Deltarune Origins - Weird Route
description: Adds the following origins: Kris, Susie, Ralsei, Weird Noelle, King, Jevil, Queen and Spamton.
body:
# Now you can play as the characters from Deltarune and use their various abilities to assist you in your adventures.

If you or your friends aren't satisfied with their powers or weaknesses, you can also choose the Adult Human origin. This origin is slightly different from the typical Minecraft human but aims to stay as close as possible to the full vanilla experience.

Currently, the mod features nine origins (you can pick weird/normal route when downloading):
![Deltarune: Origins & Powers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4966c2224feb54f1449565f4fc8d5eb298ff44c9.png)

- Lightner Group: Mobs do 15% more damage  (5% if you're playing as Ralsei).
- Darkner Group: Mobs do not attack you, natural regeneration and shields are disabled.


You are on the Weird Route page. For the Normal Route, press [HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/deltarune-origins)

**REQUIRES PEHKUI, APUGLI AND ORIGINS EXTRA KEYBINDS TO FUNCTION PROPERLY!**

Discord Server: https://discord.gg/JhsunaSqJv
